revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Dead end}} begin-->{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{<includeonly>subst:</includeonly>NAMESPACE}}|<includeonly>[[Category:Pages with incorrectly substituted templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>|}}{{Ambox | name = Dead end | class = ambox-dead_end | type = style | image = [[File:OOjs UI icon link-ltr.svg|35px|link=|alt=]] | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''has no [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking|links]] to other Wikipedia articles.''' | fix = Please help [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve this article] by adding links [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking#Overlinking and underlinking|that are relevant to the context]] within the existing text. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Dead-end pages | all = All dead-end pages | cat2 = Articles covered by WikiProject Wikify | all2 = All articles covered by WikiProject Wikify }}<!--{{Dead end}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dead_end here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
